use_cases: Displaying portfolio or gallery images with smooth spring animations
Showcasing product images in e-commerce carousels
Presenting team members or testimonials in a media carousel
Featuring highlighted content or blog post images
Creating an image gallery for real estate property listings
ai_summary: A smooth Framer Motion-powered image carousel with spring animations for seamless horizontal navigation. Features image cards with titles displayed in a responsive layout that works across desktop and mobile platforms. Uses motion values and animate functions for fluid transitions between carousel items.
